name: postgres
description: PostgreSQL database query access via MCP — read-only schema inspection and SQL execution

files.pack.toml:
[pack]
name = "postgres"
version = "0.1.0"
description = "PostgreSQL database query access via MCP — read-only schema inspection and SQL execution"
authors = ["PackWeave"]
license = "MIT"
repository = "https://github.com/PackWeave/registry"
keywords = ["postgres", "postgresql", "database", "sql", "mcp"]

[[servers]]
name = "postgres"
command = "npx"
args = ["-y", "@modelcontextprotocol/server-postgres@latest"]
transport = "stdio"
tools = ["query"]

[servers.env.POSTGRES_URL]
required = true
secret = true
description = "PostgreSQL connection string, e.g. postgresql://user:pass@localhost:5432/dbname"
